game.title: Legend of Lu: Remastered
game.short_text: A classic platformer game featuring Luis the Capybara.

details.title: Legend of Lu: Remastered
details.description:
Legend of Lu is BACK!
Relive the classic in this amazing updated experience with “Legend of Lu: Remastered”. It's the same ol’ capybara you loved from way back when but with new updated graphics and extra digital content for you to enjoy. 

Follow the journey of the martial arts fighter Luis the Capybara to save his (retiring) Master!



Never played the original game? 
Do not fret, your trusty pal over here is streaming BOTH the original game AND the remake at the same time! Don't forget to leave a follow and sub to see if they can beat both modes in one go! #2Games1Controller #classicmode #modernmode



Launch Trailer




Legend of Lu is a classic platformer game featuring Luis the Capybara. Lu was born in a land far away however he was raised practicing martial arts with his master from a very young age. Lu is well versed in the art of the bō staff. He has become a skilled warrior who is quick to act but never reckless.
In this remastered version, we're bringing you all the experiences and features in the original game, even while also including new ones.
Features:
Enjoy your platforming journey in 2 modesUpdated graphics and art styleExpanded enemy AIRemastered musicNew cutscenesNew hard mode difficulty optionExtra collectibles and digital contents to unlock!









Legend of Lu: Remastered and/or Legend of Lu is a game created for BigMode Game Jam 2023. We took the creative liberty of applying the theme "mode" through the remaster mode switch mechanic and building the entire idea around remastered game vs. original game playthrough. Player is playing as a streamer tackling the challenge of playing 2 games(classic and remastered) at once with one controller. Any kind of feedback and support is very appreciated.Game download is recommended for best gameplay performance.Default Controls*all controls are rebindable in settings, game offers controller support.← : left → : right Space:  jump
 S: use staffShift: switch mode
 P: open stream layout (pause)
Digital Library

Artworks: https://torosiken.artstation.com/projects/Ge3kbV
Music: https://on.soundcloud.com/WUYDi

Credits
Team
Michael GrieshoferSantiagoBoscan07Toromini.music

action icon plugin: https://godotengine.org/asset-library/asset/1431
Thank you for playing our game!
P.S.: There's a little secret reward in the game if you managed to beat the hard mode.

game.title: SLUG MODE
game.short_text: Defeat the Slug in several different game modes!

details.title: SLUG MODE
details.description:
Thanks for checking out SLUG MODE! If you've got feedback to share, we'd love to hear it.
SLUG MODE is our submission to Bigmode Game Jam 2023. Our goal was to build a game where players could experience battling a single boss across several  modes. In each mode, we wanted the visuals, audio, and gameplay to feel distinct yet connected by shifting style, tone, and genre between levels. We also wanted the boss to be a slug.
The last few weeks were challenging, but we all pushed ourselves and learned a lot. Thank you to the Bigmode team for hosting the event.

game.title: Bigmode Jam Kart 2023
game.short_text: Kart Racer made for Bigmode Game Jam 2023

details.title: Bigmode Jam Kart 2023
details.description:
Made for https://itch.io/jam/bigmode-2023/entriesPlease activate full screen mode for the best experience, and play with a controller if possible. See the How to Play section on the title screen for the controls. Your first goal while playing the game should be to not fall off the sides, and the second goal is to master the boost mechanics so that you can beat the Hard Mode rivals. To beat the Hard Mode rivals you must also master swapping in and out of HoverKart Mode to maximize your speed at the price of maneuverability.
Last month I was playing a lot of Mario Kart with my family and having a blast, so for the Bigmode Jam 2023 I decided to make a Kart Racer.
The awesome Menu and Fidget Acres music tracks were custom made by Bryce with Rice, many thanks to Bryce and sorry for butchering your meticulous recordings in the scramble to get the game released. The raw music tracks are even more amazing than the clips I edited down to include in the game.
All Rival race data was recorded live by myself, so when you're racing against the rivals you really are racing against my ghost.
I was hoping to have unlockable characters featured in the game but I ran out of time, so all characters are unlocked by default. I also wanted to add more respawn points so that racers did not always reset to the Starting Line after falling, but I was running into too many issues to get that working in time.
Thanks for playing! Please share any feedback you have but keep in mind this was made in 18 days. As I type this description, it is 1 hour until the Jam submission deadline and I need some sleep.

game.title: Tarot Survivors
game.short_text: FPS Bullet-heaven

details.title: Tarot Survivors
details.description:
>>  Development will continue under the name Arcana Immortals! << Interested in playtesting? Fill out this short form.


------------------------------------------
Tarot Survivors is an FPS bullet-heaven survivor game. Avoid hordes of enemies as you collect XP and level up your spells (Fizzy, Starburst, and Orbit), all while you play cards from your Tarot deck. Your drawn card will be played every minute, and will change the game mode. Each card can only be used once, so choose wisely!
Survive, get stronger, and eventually play the Death card and attempt to overcome the ultimate obstacle.

ControlsMove: WASDDraw Card: Left Click / ECards activate on their own every minute.

Card Descriptions
Death: Summons the final boss who slowly kills you over time.
Cheep: Spawns chickens. Big: Enemies turn big, and spawns some special guests. Beeg: Spawn the beeg guy himself.Jammer: Disables radar.Dark: Visibility decreases.Hyper: Move faster.Slow: Enemies and bullets are slower.God: You can't take damage.Attract: Pulls all XP to you.

Tips
- Fizzy, Starburst and Orbit are spells and are good to level up early.- Running away from enemies can keep you alive, but be sure to collect XP or else you will fall behind.- Duration+ increases how long a bullet lasts on screen (great for powering up Starburst and Orbit)- Getting rid of annoying cards early can be good.- Playing cards that spawn enemies for increased XP can also be good early to get ahead of the curve.Credits:
@grogdev - Code / Art
@tophtacular - Music / Code

game.title: Metal Mode
game.short_text: A tower defense roguelike with mechs and dice!

details.title: Metal Mode
details.description:
I HIGHLY RECOMMEND that you download the game because this is the first embeded game that I've done. So it might have some issues, and the scroll is used (minimally).
You only need to use the MOUSE:Left ClickRight ClickRight HOLDScroll Wheel
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------| CREDITS |-------------------------------------------------------------------------#
[Art] - Devious Oatmeal[Code] - Devious Oatmeal[Music] - Rusterdax (Great musician, I highly recommend their work)[SFX] - Epic Stock Media and Various free sounds
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------#

This game was made for the Big Mode Game Jam.
I've made many small games (Very few actually finished) and figured this jam would be a good way to showcase and try to further apply what I've learned.
This is my 2nd jam ever, and had a blast working on this!

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::|  STORY  |:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
Something I love doing with all my games is have them be connected to each other, or have them in some sort of grouping; each new game adding to the lore and expanding their "Universe". Currently, I have 2 "Universes" I play around in; this one being the "Junker Punk" Universe.
In this game, you play as the "Clearing" group that eliminates the Creatures in an area ,before excavation, by using  special mechs called "Metals"; the Core being the Power Source of all your operations, which is why it's important to protect it and keep the Creatures away.
And like all objects in the "Junker Punk" Universe, these Metals are made with the scraps of fallen machines and from pieces of the Creatures that inhabit this World; which are also made of metal. "Space Mad Max"
The job is perilous and the pay's not so great, but with dwindling resources and the fact that you're a Ruster, you don't have much choice.

moreInfo.Author: Devious_Oatmeal
moreInfo.Tags: Dice, Experimental, Indie, Monsters, Pixel Art, Robots, Roguelike, Singleplayer, Tower Defense, Turn-based

game.title: Snack Attack
game.short_text: Delicious snacks are hungry for action! Help them fry their enemies as they make their escape!

details.title: Snack Attack
details.description:
The controls for the game are as follows:

A & D - Move Left & Move Right

Space - Jump

Space While In Air And Facing Wall - Wall Jump

F - Melee

F While In Air - Ground Slam

E - Special Ability
Snack attack is a 2.5D platformer game, where you play as a fast food item of your choice, escape restaurants and make it safely to the farmer.
This game started out as something where you would be playing as a potato who spawns underground and has to make it back to the farm. The gimmick was that he would be able to rotate gravity. He was known as 'Rotato Potato'. 
However this swiftly changed into french fries, and eventually into many fast food characters. Then, the entire restaurant was built. The underground assets were already made so we stuck with it.
The idea is simple; you play as a fast food item who has the ability to melee attack, ground smash from the air and also have a unique special ability. Currently we have two playable characters; Papa Fritas and Colonel Cola. Papa Fritas can throw condiment grenades and Colonel Cola can freeze his enemies and smash them into pieces.

Please note that this game was made for the BigMode game jam and will not be receiving any further updates. However, due to the characters being well designed, they may appear in future, non-jam games.
Coding, 3D Modeling & Music - https://twitch.tv/imShredda
Animation & Level Design - https://www.twitch.tv/bott1edbott1e
UI Elements - https://twitch.tv/umm_hello_dere

game.title: Bon Voyage Charlie!
game.short_text: Save the skies as a multi-modal moggy!

details.title: Bon Voyage Charlie!
details.description:
**Some people are reporting issues when pressing a button, it looks like this is down to xml files being altered in decompression on some machines. It can be fixed by editing the file Preferences.xml under Source/Content/XML and setting musicVolume and sfxVolume to 0 (you should then be able to turn these back up from the options menu)**
Charlie is off on a well earned holiday, but some rude kittens on the flight haven't switched their phones to airplane mode. In order to avoid CATastrophy he'll have to tap into his many (more specifically, three) animalistic modes in order to dash, hop, and climb his way around the cabin, righting these egregious wrongs!
Our entry to the Big Mode Game Jam 2023, Bon Voyage Charlie is a 2D platformer designed to be short and snappy in order to promote high score chasing speed runs. Switch fluidly between modes in order to move smoothly through the levels, picking your own path around the objectives.
We've also included an in-game level editor and dev console under the options menu to allow you to create your own challenges and tweak the movement to suit you. 
The Team for the Jam consists of a programmer (Wayne), an artist (Elina) and an audio specialist (Abe), each participating in their first jam!
The game was built in the Monogame framework, meaning everything from basic physics and collision detection to animation and audio implementation had to be built from scratch.
Unzip the contents in a place of your choosing and run BonVoyage.exe (may just appear as BonVoyage in file explorer, windows like to hide file extensions).

game.title: Big Moat
game.short_text: Expand your moat, defend your kingdom, and survive!

details.title: Big Moat
details.description:
Big Moat was made for the 2023 Bigmode Game Jam, where the theme was MODE.
You've done it! You're finally king at last, however you've stepped on quite a few toes in the process. Now everyone hates you and is out to destroy your newfound kingdom. Earn gold, build defenses, expand your moat, and survive the onslaught of foes in this pixel art tower defense game!
Controls
Right click - deselect active structureWASD (or middle click) - camera movementEscape - pause the gameScroll wheel - zoom camera in and out
Our Theme Interpretation
For Big Moat, we decided to involve the MODE theme in multiple ways. The first (and obvious) is a play on words. The second is the mode switching between rounds. The player swaps between a building mode (the time to plan and fortify defenses), and a battle mode (the time for enemies to attack you).
Notes
Play the downloadable .zip version of the game for better performance, resolution scaling, and more!Made in Godot

moreInfo.Author: Big Boy Games
moreInfo.Tags: bigmode, Casual, High Score, Indie, Medieval, Pixel Art, Singleplayer, Tower Defense

game.title: Race Against a Duck
game.short_text: Can you win a race against nature's All Terrain Vehicle?

details.title: Race Against a Duck
details.description:
"Water... Land... Sky..."
"Do you have what it takes to defeat nature's All Terrain Vehicle?"
We hope you enjoy our newest game, made for the Big Mode game jam! Featuring misbradventures with art & music, TrainOfDarkness on the race music, and myself (CommanderJersey) on programming. I hope you enjoy discovering just how hard it is to beat a duck in a race!
2/1/2024 Update: The game is currently being developed into an expanded release! Wishlist 'Race Against a Duck: Duck Deluxe' on Steam for news & updates! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2808150/Race_Against_a_Duck_Duck_Deluxe/

If you like the game, I'd love it for you to check out our big game that we're currently working on: Space Crab VS! It has a free demo too, both here on itch.io and on Steam.

game.title: Mecha Mode
game.short_text: Mayhem and Madness in an arena based FPS, with constantly changing gun!

details.title: Mecha Mode
details.description:
THE FORESIGHT COPORATION COMMISSIONS YOU TO ERADICATE THE GOBLIN INFESTATION ON THE FORESIGHT MARS RESEARCH FACILITY.  YOU ARE FORBIDDEN TO LEAVE THE FACILITY UNTIL ALL PESTS ARE ELMINATED.


This game and all assets used in it was made for and during BigModeGameJam2023
Mecha-Mode is a manic FPS combat survival arena in which you fight hordes of Undead Space Punk Rock goblins, meanwhile dealing with an uncontrollable virus that constantly forces your weaponry and playstyles to change throughout the game. CONTROLSWASD - MovementSpace - JumpLeft click - ShootLeft shift - DashR - ReloadE - InteractMECHA MODES MAYHEMAs apart of your task you will be provided with a mech. This mech is expected to glitch out and will switch modes. These modes switch up your playstyle by changing your weapons, movement and Goblin attributes. FORESIGHT COPORATION FACILITYThe Foresight Corporation has noticed the faulty mode switching and has placed a solution in the middle of the facility. Pressing this button allows you to access the Mech's terminal prompting 3 modes to be removed per round. Accessing the button also starts the round, the punks will enter the facility through the teleportation pads.THE GOBLINS

The endless horde of Undead Punk-Rock crazy Space goblins from Mars are overrunning the Foresight Corporation! As apart of your task you are to exterminate these Space goblins. They may seem a bit deranged but these crafty punks know how to use tools, guns and vehicles they've stolen and repurposed.  CreditsTHIS GAME WAS MADE BY SUSPICIOUS JAM @SusJamGames@timedotdelta@LeptonyxArt@devshark_au@FatGuyInSpaceAdditional credits and detailsCOME JOIN US ON DISCORD!

game.title: ADMINISTER
game.short_text: A farming game inside a computer

details.title: ADMINISTER
details.description:
!WARNING!
Contains flashing lights that can be unsuitable for photosensitive players!


Description
Since its USER has gone missing, it is now up to the citizens of an abandoned computer to upkeep their home. Play as BYTE, a small green resident of the computer who has been given ADMIN privileges to help everyone. 

Controls
ENTER -  confirm (title screen)


Q&A (Tutorial Spoilers)

Q: What if I run out of bits (money)?

A: Don't.


Q: How do I farm?
A: Buy seeds from the Interweb, grow them using ADMIN privileges, sell them in the Mail.

Q: Where do I go next?
A: Check for red exclamation marks on the applications 

V1 Bug (End Spoiler): 
Closing out the Computer application after inserting all upgrades causes the button to turn invisible on reopen.  You can still interact with the button, it's just invisible.  

Credits

Programming - Ryan Chu (rychuz)
Art - Hannah Feder (foodwad)
Writing - Ryan + Hannah
Music/Sound Effect assets from Pixabay and Freesound
Photo from Pixabay



For BIGMODE game jam

game.title: Dunki Dunki Panic
game.short_text: Crafted exclusively for the first ever BIGMODE Game Jame!

details.title: Dunki Dunki Panic
details.description:
Help Biggy defeat the evil Pie King and restore the Candy Kingdom to peace!

No one knows why the Pie King went bad, but it all started when he got that scoop of ice cream.


Controls
Supports both keyboard or controller, but using a controller is much easier. Input map can be updated from the "Options" or "Pause" menu screens.
Keyboard
Walk left/right: A/D keys, left/right arrow keysPick up/throw item: J keyAim while throwing: WASD keys, arrow keysDrop cube without throwing: Press down while throwingJump: Space barRun: Shift keyPause: Escape keyMenu Accept: Enter keyMenu Cancel: Escape key
Controller
Walk left/right: D-Pad, left stickPick up/throw item: X/Y buttonsAim while throwing: D-Pad, left stickDrop cube without throwing: Press down while throwing
Jump: A/B buttonsRun: A/B buttons
Pause: Start button
Menu Accept: A button (Nintendo style)Menu Cancel: B button (Nintendo style)

game.title: Sticko Mode
game.short_text: Plan your attack in PREDICTO MODE. Execute it in STICKO MODE.

details.title: Sticko Mode
details.description:
Plan your attack in PREDICTO MODEExecute it in STICKO MODE
Bigmode Game Jam 2023 Finalist!BEST PLAYED DOWNLOADED. WE TESTED THE BROWSER VERSION EVEN LESS THAN THE DOWNLOADED. PLEASE. IT'S ALSO PRETTIER
Features:
 
Carefully plan your route to eliminate home invaders from outer space in PREDICTO mode.Play a high-stakes rhythm game to execute your carefully planned route in STICKO mode.
How to Play:
    
PREDICTO ModeWASD to move.
 
Double tap WASD to dash.WASD + ENTER to attack or reflect. 
You can move or dash in eight directions but can only attack or reflect in four (see below)BACKSPACE to undo an action. 

STICKO ModeWASD to hit arrow key circles.
ENTER to hit the cane key circles.

Programming, Art - Alan Cheng (https://www.youtube.com/@aaaalan)  Programming - Oshadha Gunasekara (https://github.com/ogunasekara) Programming, Level Design - Minh Nguyen (mtnguyen.dev@gmail.com)Programming, Music - Rosune (rosunestudios@gmail.com)Programming, Level Design - Eric JaramilloDownload and unzip sticko-mode-build-v2.zipExecute Sticko Mode.exe

game.title: Grow BIG (or go home)
game.short_text: Go big or go home

details.title: Grow BIG (or go home)
details.description:
Scientist Dr. Edward has always been insecure about his height. His colleagues always made fun of him for it. Now, Ed has had enough. With his homemade concoction, he's set on achieving his goal and growing big!

This game was created in 2.5 weeks for BigMode game jam 2023, featuring 2 gamemodes: Bigmode and Smallmode. 

Controls: Mouse and Keyboard
BigMode:
[WASD] - Feet placement
[LeftShift] - Stomp
[LMB] - Left Arm Attack
[RMB] - Right Arm Attack
SmallMode:
[WASD] - Player movement
[Mouse] - Camera movement
[LeftShift] - Dodge

Known Bugs and Additional Notes
We forgot to remove some debug commands in current build, so some keypresses may manually spawn objects. Avoid hitting [h], [j], and [space].The cat in Smallmode may start floating if it lands on obstacles. The hit indicator may become inaccurate because of that.

game.title: Shepherd of the Convergence
game.short_text: Will you bring Harmony or Chaos? Your choice in this tight 2D platformer with multiple endings.

details.title: Shepherd of the Convergence
details.description:
CONTROLS:
ACTIONSKeyboardControllerMove Left
 L ARROW
LEFT on Analog stick or D-Pad
Move Right
R ARROW
RIGHT on Analog stick or D-Pad
Swap DimensionsX
Right Face Button (X on Xbox)
JumpC
Bottom Face Button
(A on Xbox)
StrikeV
Right Face Button
(B on Xbox)

*** This game was made in 20 days for the 2023 BigMode Game Jam ***


OVERVIEW
Two Dimensions, Cyberpunk and Fantasy, once completely separate and distinct, are now beginning to converge. Nothing can stop the convergence, but as Shepherd of the Convergence, you decide if the two dimensions will merge in Harmony or in Chaos!
Use your Staff of Convergence to strike beings you want to conjoin or split in this tight 2D puzzle platformer with 8-bit inspired Graphics and sounds!
MULTIPLE ENDINGS
Two Different Ways to play! Each with their own unique ending!
1. Separate all the Robots and the Creatures to ensure CHAOS ensues when the dimensions merge!
2. Conjoin them all into Cyborgs to facilitate HARMONY when the dimensions merge!
CHIPTUNE BEETHOVEN
Beethoven! That’s the right, enjoy the  8-Bit chiptune version of Beethoven’s 5th symphony  arranged by me!
NES INSPIRED GRAPHICS
All colors in the game come from the NES Palette. And the restrictions on colors per sprite/background tile are loosely followed.
GAME JAM PROTOTYPE
This is a short prototype made for the 2023 Big Mode Game Jam. All Assets, graphics, sounds, code were made by me, Travis Battles, during the 2.5 week Jam!
The game was built on the free and open source HaxeFlixel framework. Sounds were made in sfxr. The chiptune Beethoven was made in FamiStudio.
UPDATES
3/7/2025: Converted the game to HTML build so it can be played In Browser!
4/5/2025: Big Update!MINIMAP! Part of a UI overhaul. A small minimap in the top left and a small timer on the top right of the screen replace the old UI.Redesigned Background Tileset.Redesigned the Level layout.Level now split into distinct Rooms.Camera is now Room-based, instead of constantly following the player.New Animations for Player and the BeingsController Support!Platforming QOL (Coyote time, jump buffering, etc.)

game.title: left on read
game.short_text: Please put your phones in airplane mode.

details.title: left on read
details.description:
Hello everyone this is your Captain speaking, we will depart shortly so I'll guide you through the proper procedures.
Thank you for flying with us today, we kindly ask you buckle your belts, keep your window shaders up and remain seated during the lift-off operations. We remind you that your phones should be in airplane mode at ALL times, for safety reasons.Thank you for your cooperation.
This game is a submission for the Bigmode Game Jam 2023. It should take about ten minutes to complete, as long as the weather keeps up.
During the flight, our beautiful flight assistant will randomly pass through to check that you all are keeping your phones in airplane mode, as interference from your phone might actually crash the plane. If she catches you with your phone NOT in airplane mode she might just take it from you. A really handy bar will tell you how much interference the plane can take before it fries our navigation systems, so I suggest you check it out.
Also be sure to not disturb your sleeping fellow passengers as they will call on our flight assistant. They're kind of douchebags, but hey, they payed a ticket.
On your phone you will find some really useful apps, and although we suggest you DON'T answer any messages, if you deactivate the airplane mode you can access, receive and send texts to your loved ones and to your work.
Here's our crew:
In the coding cockpitLibero Masini - linkedinKeivan Ameri - personal website
in the art wingAntea Chiariello - personal website 
in the music and sfx cabinAndrea Guerriero - Linktr.ee
in the story engineMontoya - itch.io 
Ours is a very small crew with wildly different backgrounds and experiences and we're still learning the basics of videogame making. Feedbacks are much appreciated, so leave us comments!
Enjoy your flight.Known bugs:(Some emoji might be broken due to the html5 port, in our testing, this has been fixed, but should you have issues with that we suggest downloading the windows build)
Some timers are too fast for the natural progression of the game and it's possible that the messages lines would end too soon related to the game time. A run finishes at the ten minutes mark anyway, so you might have to wait to get to the game over screen.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
